_comment: Scene creation steps template – copy this file, rename it to <scene_type>_steps.json and fill in all fields.

steps.name: Data Intake
steps.description: Receive and validate incoming 3D data and reference material.

steps.name: Modelling
steps.description: Build or adapt the 3D geometry of the scene.

steps.name: Texturing
steps.description: Apply materials and textures to the 3D geometry.

steps.name: Lighting
steps.description: Set up scene lighting according to requirements.

steps.name: Rendering
steps.description: Render the scene to the required output format.

steps.name: Quality Assurance
steps.description: Review output against scope definition and technical requirements.

steps.name: Delivery
steps.description: Package and deliver the approved output.
